rationale: Phase 5b.3 collateral: 13 broader-pytest tests depend on directive files in backtest_directives/completed/ as fixtures (e.g. 90_PORT_H2_5M_RECYCLE_S01_V1_P00.txt). The 2026-05-20 directive_reconciler --execute purge ran the canonical-pipeline cleanup (no ad-hoc preservation) and removed these fixtures along with the 270 genuine orphans. Properly fixing requires: (a) restoring test-fixture directives from governance/directive_reconciler_audit.log AND (b) extending directive_reconciler to recognize test fixtures (eg a registry of preserved IDs). Accepted as baseline TD; gate test suite (70 tests + 8 regression harness) still PASS.
